# Copilot instructions — HomeAssistantPlusMicrosoft

> Canonical standards live in the `dev-standards` repo on SOUNDWAVE/Gitea.

## What this repo is

A **documentation / reference repo** (README only) — about integrating Home
Assistant with Microsoft services. No code, no build, no releases.

## Conventions

- Content repo: edits are to `README.md` (and any docs added later).
- No HA component scaffolding applies — there's nothing to build or test.
- Keep links current; this is a public reference.

## Never

- Don't commit secrets or tenant-specific identifiers.
